backend: Admin endpoints require admin role (403 for non-admin)
Protected endpoints require auth (posts, community, network, trades, gallery)

TradeDealsPanel tabs: Incoming, Outgoing, History all found
CreateCommunityPostModal opens with Topic, Title, Content, Images fields
Feed Filters (Filters, Nearby, Network, Verified, Has Media) all visible
Mobile responsive view with hamburger menu
Mobile bottom navigation (FEED, NETWORK, POST, MESSAGES, PROFILE)

data-testid attributes properly implemented for all major components
Component extraction successful: TradeNetworkPanel (301 lines), TradeDealsPanel (235 lines), CommunityBoard (221 lines)
Sub-components properly extracted: RecommendedTraderCard, ConnectionCard, RequestCard, TradeCard, HistoryCard, EmptyState, CreateCommunityPostModal
